admission: Admissions are open. Visit the admission office from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM.
hostel: Hostel fee is ₹71,000 per year including mess charges.
library: The library is open from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on all working days.
exam: The examination schedule is available on the college portal.
attendance: Students must maintain at least 75% attendance.
placement: The placement cell conducts training sessions and campus recruitment drives.
scholarship: Scholarships are available based on merit and eligibility criteria.
transport: College buses operate on major city routes.
fees: You can pay your fees online through the college portal or at the accounts office.
canteen: The college canteen serves breakfast, lunch, snacks, and beverages.
wifi: The college Wi-Fi password is available from the IT Cell.
principal: You can meet the Principal during office hours with prior permission.
hod: Please contact your department office to meet the Head of Department.
id card: Students should carry their college ID card at all times.
holiday: Holiday notifications are published on the official college notice board.
result: Results are announced on the student portal after evaluation.
syllabus: The syllabus is available on the college website and department portal.
timetable: Class timetables are provided by your department.
sports: The college provides indoor and outdoor sports facilities.
clubs: Students can join technical, cultural, and coding clubs.
internship: The Training and Placement Cell shares internship opportunities regularly.
contact: You can contact the college help desk during office hours.
